productDisplayName: Titan Raga Women Gold Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analog watch with a stainless steel oval case Dial style: Gold dial with gold hands with floral motifs on the dial face Strap style: Stainless steel silver and gold strap with a fold over press clasp Features: Branding on the dial Screw to reset time Water resistance upto 30 metres Warranty: 2 years against manufacturing defects
